examples: The weapon used in the raid was a replica.
A replica of the Arch de Triumph that usually stands in Paris has been transported to Tokyo Bay for the festival.
It was decided to make the replica half-scale for reasons of cost and time, and synthetic materials were used for the stitching.
One replica showroom houses classic and talked-about models, including the 166MM, an extremely rare car from 1953.
The architects had to create a replica that could pass for the real thing.
